1: Then said the LORD LORD unto me, Go yet, love a woman beloved of her her friend, yet an adulteress, according to the love of the LORD LORD toward the children of Israel, who look to other gods, and love flagons of wine.
2: So I bought her to me for fifteen pieces pieces of silver, and for for an homer of barley, and an half homer of barley:
3: and I said unto her, Thou shalt abide for me many days; thou shalt not play the harlot, and thou shalt not be for another another man: so will will I also be be for thee.
4: For the children of Israel shall abide many days without a king, and without a prince, and without a sacrifice, and without an image, and without an ephod, and without without teraphim:
5: afterward shall the children of Israel return, and seek the LORD LORD their God, and David their king; and shall fear the LORD LORD and his goodness in the latter days.
